body.title: Extract generalizable lessons from pe_chain traces and surface as palace proposals
body.result: closed — pe_chain coding mechanism decommissioned; ticket no longer relevant to reasoning-first direction
body.description:
pe_chain runs leave rich execution traces (basket state, hypotheses generated, edits applied, test results). Non-obvious design choices, hidden invariants, and workarounds discovered during execution should be surfaced as proposed palace nodes for Akien approval — not discarded. Current gap: lessons are captured only when CC manually proposes them at sprint close. Target: after pe_chain closes, a lightweight extraction pass proposes 0-N palace nodes (path + title + content); Akien approves via cc_inbox with response_expected=True; approved nodes are written.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/tools/pe_chain.py (_pe_close phase), wild_igor/igor/tools/lesson_extractor.py (new)
**Design rules:** theigors/rules/coding, theigors/rules/docs-live-in-code, theigors/rules/database
**Scope boundary:** In scope: extraction pass at _pe_close; surface proposed nodes via cc_inbox; write on approval. Out of scope: automated approval (Akien always approves), retroactive extraction from old traces.
**Test plan:** Run pe_chain on a ticket with a non-trivial implementation choice; verify cc_inbox contains a proposed palace node with response_expected=True; approve; verify node written to palace. Verify cc_inbox empty when extraction finds nothing notable.
